title: senecio hohenackeri
intro: Senecio hohenackeri, also known as the woolly groundsel or Hoehnacker's ragwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and even exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, Senecio hohenackeri is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
